introSection: Cobra is a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. The ride was built by Zierer and opened in 2000.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train has a Cobra's head, as opposed to the standard Ladybird trains that often appear on this model.

fullText:
Cobra is a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. The ride was built by Zierer and opened in 2000.



Yellow track and red supports.

The train has a Cobra's head, as opposed to the standard Ladybird trains that often appear on this model.
